gap_summaries: [ultrathink] FIXED 🔴 gwt_fallback() marked ALL ACs as mapped when ANY GWT test existed — rewrote to per-AC keyword matching with ≥2 word overlap threshold
[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 test_maps_acs_to_tests used weak len>=1 assertion — replaced with distinctive AC descriptions and per-AC status verification (AC-1 mapped, AC-2 unmapped)
[ultrathink] FIXED 🟡 scan_for_n_plus_one _FOR_LOOP_RE used \s+ (required leading whitespace) — changed to \s* to also catch top-level for loops
[ultrathink] 🔵 schema-diff uses oasdiff (OpenAPI-specific) — profile-configurable via base/revision paths, no code change needed
[ultrathink] 🔵 no Marabunta migration support — Odoo-specific, deferred to future milestone if needed
